agents.label: OpenAI Codex (ACP shim: codex-acp)
agents.notes: Wraps the codex CLI. Run `codex login` first to authenticate with OpenAI (or set OPENAI_API_KEY).

agents.label: Claude Agent (ACP shim: claude-agent-acp)
agents.notes: Uses the Claude Code CLI's auth under the hood. Run `claude /login` first, or set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.

agents.label: OpenCode
agents.notes: Needs an LLM provider configured. Run `opencode auth login` to pick a provider (OpenRouter, OpenAI, etc.), or set the provider's API key env var.

agents.label: Google Gemini CLI
agents.notes: Uses Gemini CLI's native ACP mode. Run `gemini` first to sign in with Google, or set GEMINI_API_KEY/Vertex AI environment variables.

agents.label: GitHub Copilot CLI
agents.notes: Requires an active GitHub Copilot subscription. Run `copilot login`, use a supported GitHub CLI OAuth token, or set COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN/GH_TOKEN/GITHUB_TOKEN to a supported token.
